1270 E 17th St, Idaho Falls, ID 83404, USA
Located just off of the sidewalk. There are three trees, the western one doesn’t seem to be doing great. The plums are pingpong ball sized, sweet and plentiful.
Plum trees line memorial drive! Not sure if they spray,so make sure and wash well before eating. Other people also harvest from these trees! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
